answers.answer: Flat mirror — place under crates/cclab-sdd/src/lens/ mirroring current cclab-lens/src/ structure. Preserves existing module paths.
No MCP tools for lens. Lens is CLI-only. No MCP tool migration needed.
Remove cclab-lens crate immediately in this change. No transition wrapper.
N/A — cclab-lens has no PyO3 bindings.
Keep SpecIR at top-level src/spec_ir/ (already exists in cclab-sdd). Both SDD pipeline and lens code reference it. After merge, lens code imports from the existing spec_ir module.
